review_text: Cabin we had was in need of some serious maintenance and TLC. Paint peeling off walls, doors and frames. Sofa was ripped and dirty. Old musty smell throughout. Sliding door difficult to lock as poorly maintained and worn. I did let office staff know on departure of our disappointment in our cabin. The park itself was spacious & clean and in a great spot. We usually are in our caravan, so checked out sites and facilities, great for families.
We love coming here.

We stayed there for Mothers Day which really was Daughters Day. My little one had the best time. It has heaps of things to do for kids. Even though it was cold we got to enjoy the hot spa and the pool. Excellent place for a winter holiday as well. (As you know kids will swim all year) My little one cried because we didn’t stay long enough. Next time we will definitely stay for a couple of days. Awesome place for families to holiday
Excellent spot right near the beach! Staff are beautiful and helpful too and clean facilities
Beautiful park next to a beautiful beach! We don't have kids but now we need to have to have some and come back with them.
Great location and customer service. Such easy access to a beautiful beach. Excellent facilities at camp kitchen and the electric BBQs worked really well.

What a gem of a place! This was a wonderful location with beach access and we had everything we needed on site. The cabins were well appointed, clean and comfortable, and the staff were friendly and helpful. We would definitely stay again!

The park itself is lovely, very well kept. The gardeners do a fabulous job. The pool and kids areas are very well equipped. But the family deluxe cabin is so tired, the place was dirty on arrival. Kitchen bench had holes in it. Saucepan just filthy and sticky.  Splash back in kitchen was fatty and dirty. Veranda roof was rotten, rusted with a hole in it. Shower tiles had mould. Bed had body shaped dip in it.  The ceiling fan looked like it had never been cleaned. The kitchen rubbish bin had the last occupants rubbish in it.
The park is great, staff at desk were lovely. But I never stay there again.

We stayed at Ingenia One Mile Beach during the January school holidays in a Deluxe Villa. The accommodation was nothing short of amazing. A fully equipped kitchen with a private bbq on the large deck. There was a laundry and large family bathroom. The 2 rooms with queen beds had their own tv and celling fans and the 3rd room with 2 bunk beds was spacious. The lounge room and dining area was enough for a large family. The nespresso coffee machine was a nice touch and we loved having a dishwasher. The staff were more than helpful and the manager was great to deal with. Would highly recommend at Ingenia One Mile Beach.

A wonderful location right next to beach, excellent facilities in a well planned layout. The pool is great for the youngsters, plenty of lounge chairs poolside. The jumping pad is massive and ideal for acrobatics. Staff were awesome.
The afterhour reception was very helpful and accomodating. Nice location with direct access to beach.

We stayed here for five nights over Easter in a family spa cabin as a family group with several other families.  You cannot beat the location as not many holiday parks give you direct access to the beach.   The behaviour of the park visitors was much better than those at some of your competitors and this may be due to the distance from Sydney and the cost (which isnt't cheap) which is likely to ensure that only dedicated holiday makers will come along. Another big plus is that we could bring our dog and there were plenty of park visitors who brought their dogs too and again these dogs were all well behaved.

We didnt have much dealings with staff but when we did they were extremely professional and could answer any questions with ease. There were some cockroaches in our cabin however this is inherent in having a large holiday park adjoining coastal bushland.

I would not particularly recommend the cafe adjoining the holiday park it does struggle to handle customers and got orders wrong.  Thankfully there are some good dining options in Nelson Bay and Shoal Bay not to mention sufficient cooking facilities in the park itself.

I would definitely recommend Ingenia Holidays One Mile Beach anyone considering a beach side holiday.
We had a great time camping at One Mile beach. The amenities are great, bathrooms kept clean, great bbqs and plenty of activities to entertain the kids. Thanks!
Slightly older in style, but still really beautiful and exceptionally well-equipped and Clean cabins.

We absolutely loved our stay here. The location is fantastic—right next to the beach, just a 2-minute walk. The pool is large, with great facilities for kids, plus a relaxing jacuzzi. We would definitely return for another stay

We had good experience at Ingenia one mile beach. Only problem was 1st seems like shower has very slow drainage possible blockage.due to which bathroom got flooded.2nd in kitchen oven and gril was not working. Lucky they had lot of kitchen area outside our cabin.3rd Jumping pillow jas lot hole that kids cpudnt go on it as it was not bouncy enough.Best part was easy access to beach which seema like personal beach.Next to it is cafe and resturant.Nice food and cafe.

Great location, but poorly managed by the cleaners our cabin had dust everywhere causing asthma attacks…  the cabins need a full clean. Air conditioner hasn’t been cleaned in months if not years by the looks of the dust

This is the most beautiful caravan park. We just lived our stay here. The beach is pristine and the access is so easy from the park.
The facilities are excellent and the pool felt like a resort!

Great campsite and value for money
money. Pool and facilities are spotless clean

We had a really nice stay here, with a beautiful beach just nearby. It was a great spot to relax and enjoy the surroundings.

Overall a pleasant and easygoing place, we would happily stay here again.

Staff was friendly but the rooms were filthy,
The floors was dirty, the bathroom did not get cleaned and when showering , small cockroaches were coming out of the spa jets, the oven and grill were greasy and not cleaned from the last people.
優點：此露營地地理位置理想，步行5分鐘就有私人海灘。另外10分鐘內車程就可到Nelson Bay和Anna Bay. 營裏亦有相當的設施供兒童玩樂。缺點：屋內設備有點殘舊，清潔程度一般。其中一間睡房沒有冷氣

The location, staff, and amenities are great. However, I wouldn’t recommend this place if you’re looking for a peaceful and restful stay. The business model seems focused more on maximizing the number of campers than on overall comfort. The roads are very narrow, large trailers are packed in everywhere, and cars are often partially parked on the pavement, which makes it quite difficult to navigate around the campsite.

There are also children everywhere. I’m sure it’s a good option for families, but as a couple, listening to loud kids running around until 11 p.m. (despite the curfew) wasn’t exactly what we had in mind for a relaxing stay.

Probably the best campground we’ve stayed at since we started travelling through Australia! There are so many great facilities, the pool is beautiful, and the amenities were always spotless. The atmosphere around the campground was lovely, with a great vibe between guests, and it’s so close to the beach.
The staff were incredibly kind and welcoming.
Thank you for everything, we hope to come back one day! ☀️

*Watch out at the beach access on the intersection of Boronia Ave, Blue Gum, Ocean Palm*
We found several bottles and broke glass and a lot of trash- defo wear shoes.

Besides that - the Holiday Park was lovely, had a spacious site, amenities were clean and barbecue area worked and was cleaned daily.
Cheers

We recently lived in this place. We had family cabin booked. Very very happy with the service. We needed some things to be done for the kitchen, there was someone who came to help within 5 min, service on point. Location really good, beach walkable distance. BBQ area has fridge and also Big TV in that area. Rooms are spectacular and everything so beautiful.

We had a really fabulous stay. The pool with hot spa is to die for on a hot day, activities for kids (not ours but our friend's). Really close to the beach, we absolutely loved it. Perhaps a ceiling fan in bedrooms could be great (it was quite warm as the aircon is only in the living area)

Highly recommend to disconnect 😍

Ideally located for easy access to the beautiful one mile beach.  Stunning pool area, great bounce mat and playgrounds for the kids..  staff are friendly and helpful.

Improvement opportunities, given the near $80 per night for a powered site:

1. The ammenities are in dire need of a revamp.
2. Roads are single van width wide and marked as 2 way traffic.  Time for a new traffic management plan and single direction traffic.
3. Powered sites are little more than sand and weeds, our weeds were not even mowed down.  Again for the price, a higher standard is expected.
Family oriented, close to beaches, next to soldiers Point bowling club great meals.

I’ve been coming here for the past 20 years, and love the place!, especially this year as Adam the receptionist was so helpful and friendly, definitely a good asset to the park, highly recommend. Hope to see him next year

Only good thing about this caravan park is the location. The beach is absolutely stunning. However - the staff are rude, the cabin was absolutely filthy, bathroom covered in mould (I didn’t want to touch anything) and this was completely ignored when I addressed it with staff. The lights also weren’t working in the kitchen and living area, this was also ignored when mentioned to staff. Extremely overpriced - not worth it! I would have been happy if staff had addressed the issues.

Camping génial , bon rapport qualité prix
Piscine avec toboggan et jacuzzi
Petit camping avec tous les équipements nécessaires et beaucoup d'air de jeu pour enfants
Très proche de la plage

Very large caravan park. It is definitely a 'party' park for large groups. Security guards roam on weekend, so on Monday night it was party central until well after midnight! It's a shame because it is in a beautiful location. Beware: although it is dog friendly, dogs are not permitted on the beach!
7th year in this park. Absolutely amazing place to stay. Staff are welcoming and friendly. Park and pool always immaculate. Coming back next year
Perfectly suitable accommodation. Service very good.

The whole team are so friendly and accommodating. We stayed on an ensuite powered caravan site and the amenities were clean and in good working order. The pool is heated and the beach is perfect for kids learning to body board or surf. The sites are a bit tight but aside from that, it’s perfect!
Adam at reception was amazing. So friendly and accomodating.

Great location
Friendly  staff
Value  for money  on the cabin we stayed  in ,extremely  clean and lovely  shower
Everything  you need for a relaxing  holiday ☆

Absolutely loved our glamping stay! From the very start, Adam was there to welcome us and honestly couldn’t have been more helpful — he went above and beyond the whole time and made us feel so at home. The place was super clean, really comfortable, and just an all-round joy to stay in. Best of all, it was a HUGE hit with my three children (happy kids = happy parents!). Such a fun, relaxing, memorable experience — we’re already talking about coming back!

We recently stayed here for a short holiday and overall, we really enjoyed our time. The staff were incredibly friendly and welcoming, which made a big difference to our experience. The facilities were great — we loved the pool, hot spa, jumping castle, and how easy it was to access the beach. There were plenty of activities, and honestly, it felt like a wonderful getaway. We enjoyed it so much that we would love to come back.

However, the main downside of our stay was the cleanliness of the accommodation. While it wasn’t messy or full of rubbish, it felt dusty and not properly cleaned. When we first walked in, there wasn’t a fresh or pleasant smell. The bedding didn’t feel clean or fresh either, and the bathroom, unfortunately, was not clean at all. There was a noticeable yellow stain running down the side of the bathroom to the floor, which was quite concerning from a hygiene point of view.

The biggest issue was the number of cockroaches and insects inside the accommodation. We understand that this is a holiday area with grass and nature, so seeing a few insects is expected. However, the amount of cockroaches was excessive. One night when I woke up to use the bathroom, it was full of cockroaches of all sizes, which was extremely unpleasant.

Considering we paid around $1,000 for two nights, we were expecting a much higher standard of cleanliness, especially in the bathroom and sleeping areas.

That said, the staff, facilities, and overall atmosphere were amazing, and this could have been the perfect holiday if the hygiene and cleaning standards were better. With improvements in this area, it would truly be an outstanding place to stay.

Worst holiday accommodation I have ever stayed, try to check in 1:30pm reception said need another 30 minutes which is ok is normal check in time is 2PM, back again 2:30pm, reception said room was still not ready! It's 3PM, and whole family still waiting in car at visitor parking.What a joke, we come to Anna Bay for 2 days short break, and waited for the room for half day. The hotel reception didn't even realize that is a problem for them seems normal! Not recommended
Fantastic holiday.  Great amenities, great staff, great place.  Already booked for 2027

Location right in front of One mile Beach with easy access from most cabins. Facilities for kids are top-notch, especially the pool which they never wanted to leave! Staff are super friendly and always ready to help.  Shout out to Aaron who went above and beyond on many occasions 🙏

Only one minor complaint is that the single bed mattresses in the cabin kids room were well below average.

Ingenia Holiday Park One Mile Beach, NSW

🌟 ★★★★☆ - An Unforgettable Beachfront Getaway! 🌟

We recently enjoyed an unforgettable beachfront escape during the New Year's Break at Ingenia Holidays One Mile Beach! The location was simply stunning, with a picturesque 1.6 km stretch of sand right at our doorstep. Each Morning I enjoyed walking at the beach, Kids had their Surfing Lessons.

This accomodation is Situated in the beautiful Port Stephens region closer to Anna Bay offering a fantastic range of accommodation options. We opted for the Premium Family Villa, and it did not disappoint Us! The villa was spacious, modern, and perfectly designed for families, comfortably sleeping up to eight guests. It featured a queen bed with an ensuite in the main bedroom, a second queen bed in the second bedroom, and two split beds in the third for the kids —ideal for our group. The living area and kitchen were well-equipped, and we loved the spacious private deck with a BBQ, perfect for enjoying outdoor dining with a view. Behind our Villa, we had cafe located just at the back door of accomodation.

During our stay, we preferred to unwind and explored 4 beaches out of 26 close by beaches. At Ingenia, we enjoyed leisurely beach strolls, refreshing swims, and fun times in the games room, jumping pillow, playground, and ball court. Kids loved being around Cage of a Cockatoo called as George. We also had a unique experiences like camel rides; sandboarding on the dunes and Quad Biking experience!

We also enjoyed New Years Fire Work at Marina, Nelson Bay organised by Port Stephens Council.

Overall, Ingenia Holidays One Mile Beach is a fantastic destination for families or anyone looking for a relaxing getaway with plenty of activities. Highly recommend!

Regards
Ash

My family and I stayed over the holiday season for three nights in a house accommodating eight people. While the stay itself was not entirely comfortable and the property would have benefited from significantly better housekeeping, as the home appeared quite neglected in terms of cleanliness, the outstanding customer service provided by two individuals truly turned our experience around. It is always reassuring to feel heard when raising reasonable concerns, and in this regard, Chris and Adam went above and beyond. I sincerely appreciate the offer extended to us, which has genuinely encouraged us to consider returning to your holiday park in the future. I hope their efforts do not go unnoticed by the Ingenia Holiday Park owners or management.
As for the location, there is very little more to say—One Mile is a beautiful spot, and our access to the main beach was exceptional.

Wir haben diesen Ferienort mit einem Camper für 1 Nacht gebucht. Der Campingplatz war schön. Die Sanitäranlagen waren grösstenteils sauber. Der Strand zudem man direkten Zugang hat einfach traumhaft. Das Personal war freundlich.  Jedoch für eine Nacht 229$ ist doch etwas teuer.

Fin campingplads, med det nødvendige. Køkken og bad var middelmådig. Vi var der 2 overnatninger. Der boede mange på pladsen og man lå meget tæt. Det var ikke nemt at finde vores plads og pladsen var meget ujævn. Vi blev ikke informeret om at det var en deleplads, og dem som senere kom var heller ikke informeret.

Området er fantastisk og det samme er stranden, det tæller en del op, fordi selve pladsen er ikke særligt indbydende. Dyrt ift. gennemsnittet.

We have travelled all over Australia with our young family and we often head to Shoal Bay or Fingal for a quick weekend away from Sydney. This was our first time at One Mile and we are so glad we stumbled upon this gem, this will be our new go to!

Where do we start… great facilities for kids, pool was clean, ammenities although older were super clean, heaps of playgrounds, direct access to the beach.

Most importantly the staff were absolutely top notch! I own a business in the service industry so customer service is always something top of mind for me and the team here met and exceeded every single expectation we had. Surprised and delighted us at every turn! Well done team, you should be proud of your efforts especially at one of the busiest times of year! you’ve got some returning guests! We will be back 🙌🏼

We had the most wonderful stay at this caravan park – it was absolutely perfect for families with kids. The facilities were clean, well maintained and thoughtfully set up to keep little ones happy and entertained. There was such a relaxed, welcoming atmosphere that made it easy for us to unwind while the kids had the best time.

A special mention to Adam, whose service was truly outstanding. He went above and beyond to make sure our stay was comfortable and enjoyable, always friendly, helpful and genuinely caring. His attention to detail and kindness made a huge difference to our experience.

We left with happy kids, great memories and will definitely be back. Highly recommend this park to any families looking for a stress-free, kid-friendly getaway!

One of my favourite holiday parks in New South Wales!! you’re literally right on the beach so it’s so easy to go for sunrise runs or have sunset picnics. Perfect to have the ultimate beach day with your accommodation literally footsteps away.

They have a wide range of accommodation to choose from the best are the villas right next to the beach entrance.

It’s a great vibe at the park for families and couples too. It’s really changed my mindset on what a holiday park typically is.
Best location and beautiful luxury tent! Very friendly staff. Wonderful experience.

I was so happy with my stay at Ingenia. I went with a group of over 60 people, and the kids were absolutely delighted. The pool was clean and well maintained, and the new cabin I stayed in was beautiful and spotless. It had all the required amenities and essentials, I didn’t need to buy a single thing other than food.

The management team, especially Chris, were fantastic in handling any small situations and were incredibly accommodating for our children. The security guard Zac S was so courteous, understanding, and wonderful to have on site. We met so many amazing people and truly loved our stay.

I couldn’t recommend this family-friendly environment highly enough and would definitely come back.

Best location, very close to beach.
Excellent park if you like crowds, somewhere to ride your e-bike, music.

We stayed in a luxury family tent, the aircon is insufficient for the size of the tent it really needs something much bigger, the tent was unbearable on a hot day, the pool is full of kids who are dive bombing people, unruly and although staff try to control the situation it goes on, the staff are friendly and accommodating, I do like the park but wouldn’t come back, just really to the amount of children who are just out of control, might have been just the time of the year as there were massive groups of people here, roaming very late, yelling, just the arrogance of the parents also.

I don’t write reviews ever but I do want to share that the camping is really crowded and the ammenities are too small and too dirty for this many people. The park says in another comment they have done something against the scootering and electric bikes on the park but they are still everywhere. You can’t rest at this camping cause there is loud music all around. Dont come to this camping if you want clean amenities and have a good time.
very good and clean nice place. Big enough for my family and good place for kids.
Didn’t take any photos..just enjoying family company
Really nice.

One of my favourite camp sites. Many amenities, clean and well maintained.

If you like fishing One Mile beach is amazing, beach worms, pipis and plenty of fish. (You can buy bait in the Ingenia reception)

Ce que je qualifie d'industriel, avec un gros bémol cependant : une super plage, avec une super balade sur sa gauche en regardant l'Ocean...
Pour le reste, rien à redire, mais on est nombreux, proches etc...
Bref, j'y retournerai, mais si je ne trouve rien qui convienne à ce que je cherche...

Our favourite place to stay for a quick family getaway. Budget cabin sleeps 4 comfortably and has everything you might need including shampoo, conditioner, wash, dishwashing liquid and basic kitchen appliances and utensils. Bedding, towels and pillows provided which were clean and comfy. My only gripe is the water in the shower was little more than a dribble at times and water temp was inconsistent - but nevertheless, it did the job. Easy beach access, amazing pool and plenty of activities for the kids. 4th time visiting and we’ll be back again.

Very nice spacious caravan park.
Clean and adequate bathrooms.
Bike/ trikes to hire for fun and a nice pool and jumping area for kids.

Lovely park - staff were very friendly & helpful. The only hiccup was the bad smell in the ensuite (ensuite site). It seemed to be the drain. We advised the staff & they checked it out but it wasn't fixed - probably needs a plumber. That was the only issue.

I am incredibly disappointed with my recent stay at this holiday park. What was meant to be a relaxing family getaway turned into a distressing and unsafe experience.

During our stay, an adult guest behaved aggressively toward my child, which was extremely upsetting for our whole family. What shocked me even more was the way the situation was handled by the onsite management. Instead of showing concern or offering support, the response felt dismissive and unprofessional. At no point were we followed up with to check on our wellbeing or to ensure the situation had been properly addressed.

We have been loyal guests of holiday parks for years, and I have never experienced anything like this. The lack of care, empathy, and basic safety measures left us feeling completely let down. I would strongly caution other families to reconsider staying here until the park improves its management and approach to guest safety.

I hope the park takes this feedback seriously, because no family should have to go through what we did.

Very neat and tidy but exceptional small spaces for caravans, manoeuvring. Without help it couldn't be easily achieved. No amenities for disabled as very old park. Lots  of cabins, a few clamping tents,pool, jumping castle & children's playground area. Locked gate with a code through to a fabulous beach cafe.|Access to thrme beach through park gates.

Stayed here in early November with a friend for a girls’ weekend and we had such a great time. We booked one of the 2 bed budget cabins and honestly it was perfect for what we needed  clean, comfy, and just a short stroll straight out the back to the beach. Such a good spot for a relaxing getaway.

The staff were also incredibly helpful. I accidentally left a brand new pair of boots in the cupboard when we checked out, and they organised everything to have them posted back to me. The communication was great and I had them back within the week. Really appreciate the effort!

Beautiful location, great service, and such a convenient place to stay. Would definitely come back again for another girls’ trip!
It was great! Definitely coming back ☺️

I’m sure my experience may have been better if it wasn’t the start of a weekend but unfortunately our travels fell at this place on a Friday night, check-in was good, pleasant staff at front desk, we had a cabin and a powered site, the site was crowded and not marked out very well, others were parked in our site, the amenities nearby were quite dirty, super loud at night till after 11pm.

Wayyyyyy to many people are crammed into this holiday park, kids and adults on scooters, bikes and walking literally everywhere, you can’t even get out of the front gate or turn around, couldn’t go in the pool as it was absolutely chockers, the cabins are tightly packed in making it hard to get into parking spots, the cabin we were in was disgusting and for the price is was absolutely not worth it, it was old, mold all over everything! Doors, windows, floors, walls, bathroom etc, disgusting curtains, the fire alarm was covered by a plastic bag, not sure what that was about but thankfully there was no emergency.

Wouldn’t recommend at peak times

Staying here at the moment and looking forward to leaving.

Cabins could do with a good clean, a lot of dirt that could easily be removed with a proper clean.

There's a wine tasting going on in the middle of the park next to the pool and kids area and it's full of feral drunk men (it's only 1pm). The pool is over run with teenage boys causing havoc and there are unattended dogs tied up inside the pool area barking non stop.

The crazy thing is an employee said that nobody works in the pool area?! No security, nobody supervising (and I don't mean somebody to supervise the small kids in the pool), nobody to control anything, even the screaming and shouting at midnight (the night security spent the night sitting on the lounges at the pool).

We stay at a lot of holiday parks around NSW and haven't stayed anywhere as rough as this before, would def avoid if you're looking for a nice family holiday.

Great facilities, decent sized van sites, close to Anna Bay and a short walk over the dunes to One Mile Beach.
Great spot for kids and adults alike.

Staff were amazing, friendly, helpful and gave us a cabin upgrade when needed and late checkout which we really appreciated. It’s right in a beautiful beach.
The accommodation was expensive relative to other options but we were there as part of a group.

An excellent place. We went with a small tent and the place was great, with shade, many families but a super respectful silence. The amenities were always impeccable and super comfortable. And the direct path to the beach was a plus 👌🏼
A great place to camp with all the comforts for a good price

Absolutely in love with the whole holiday park! My daughter didn’t want to stay inside the cabin wanted to be out the whole day which was great!
Location was good and the service was beautiful! Would definitely recommend to any family will definitely be back in the future!!

Fantastic stay - we (2 persons) booked the basic cabin for two nights. Everything you need including airfryer, electric frying pan, toaster, kettle, microwave and large fridge. Direct access to beach. Well maintained, great pool, putt putt and activities room. Excellent value for money..
Stayed on a powered site with RV. Great facilities, near to the beach and sand dunes. Would recommend and revisit

We love staying here. The grounds are kept well, the kids love the pool and jumping pillow, the putt putt and getting around the park on the bikes. The cabins are perfect for a family of 5. There’s always something on, movies, wine tasting, the ice cream van does the rounds and so does the fresh seafood truck. Highly recommend!
Nice park to base yourself for the Tomaree Coastal walk. Has EV chargers
Great place to stay for the kids, if windy don’t book a glamping tent, you won’t sleep. Overall would stay again, perfect location

Der Campground liegt - erreichbar über einen kurzen Weg durch die Dünen- direkt an diesem schönen, flachen Strand,  der sowohl für Familien wie auch für Surfer geeignet ist.
Die Plätze sind durchgängig gut ausgestattet und das Preis- Leistungsverhältnis ist sehr gut.
Waschräume und Toiletten sind sauber; Waschmaschine,  Trockner und Wäscheständer sind ebenfalls vorhanden.
Ein kleiner Nachteil ist der meistens fehlende Schatten.

Stayed on a powered caravan site with our dog. Note that the beach the park is on is not dog friendly but there are so many dog friendly beaches near by this didn’t bother us.

Bathrooms were nice and clean.
We were able to get late check out to 12pm with no extra cost or check out at 4pm for $20. Super reasonable.

Easy check in and great communication. Nice cafe adjacent.

Highly recommend.
This was great value for money with all the facilities you need. Looking forward for a longer stay next time !!
One of a great ocean view living spots

A great park, with direct access to a beautiful beach. We went mid-week and it was nice and quiet. A great pool, and fun activities for kids. The glamping tents had everything you needed! Highly recommend.

UPDATE:
thank you to the owner for their public reply, but just updating to advise that I haven't heard anything privately. It's great to publicly acknowledge the review, but I'd appreciate follow through on the direct contact.
----------

We stayed at Ingenia Holidays One Mile Beach For three nights in a 2 bedroom, dog friendly, deluxe family cabin. We paid approx $330 per night, and chose the deluxe to ensure a beautiful stay.

The positives:
- The staff were lovely and very responsive.
- Location is excellent with direct beach access, not far from the Anna Bay shops, and the rest of the peninsula. Also it's a good location for the Koala Sanctuary down the road.
- The adjacent café/restaurant was very convenient, and had great service. And we ate dinner from there two nights in a row. Lovely atmosphere on the Saturday night with some live music.
- customer service was great in keeping in touch with us via text message. Updates about checking and checkout were helpful.

The negatives:
- Unfortunately, the standard of the cabin was well below what it should be, even if it were the basic edition, and certainly not as advertised as the deluxe edition.

The kitchen cabinets were all greasy, with tinfoil and food crumbs from the previous occupant left in the oven. The cutlery was similarly unclean (a dishwasher would be a good addition, even if just for basic hygiene reasons). The microwave was so ancient, it had an old turn-dial, and wasn't digital.

The bedding had marks/stains on it. The mattress itself was ancient and so soft I've come home with a sore back. And there were cockroach droppings under the bedside lamps.

The bathroom walls had handprints all over them. The toilet seat needed to be cleaned. And the  doors and skirting throughout the cabin had mould/marks on them, and the walls were covered in dust.

The window frame behind the dining table had so much mould from top to bottom where you go to open it, that I didn't want to touch it.

I called reception after noticing the problem on arrival, and whilst they were very friendly and wanted to help, they informed me that there were no other cabins available and that they would send housekeeping.

Housekeeping did arrive very quickly, and again, while very friendly and certainly happy to help, simply changing the bedding, and wiping down the kitchen, was never going to be a replacement for what this cabin needs, and that is a really good deep clean.

The corrugated roof on the patio area had holes in it due to rust that need to be fixed.

I think the cabin has a lot of potential, but clearly costs are being cut on cleaning bills, and subsequently I spent my first hour in the cabin using antibacterial wipes I luckily had in the car, cleaning everything down. I also had to purchase my own toilet paper, because the toilet paper in the cabin was cheap and awful, and soap for the kitchen sink.

I don't expect a holiday park to be five stars, but I do expect it to be clean. Especially when you charge additional costs for the 'deluxe' version. I really hope the management take this review under  guidance, and invest in deep cleaning their cabins, so future occupants feel more comfortable than we did. I also hope that we just got unlucky with our cabin, and that other cabins are of a higher standard.
Such a good place with an affordable price!
Alles top!

Ensuite Sites are very tight for larger vans. Some vans were protruding on the roadway which made it difficult for other people to navigate around whilst accessing/leaving site.||Park amenities are old but functional and the park offer a range of activities suitable for young families. ||Could be some improvements like a splash pad nearby the pool amongst the golf area that has a run down park. Plenty of shade and tables already existing. ||There’s a nice little beach on your doorstep.||Overall it’s a nice little getaway.

The reception staff was friendly and very efficient
I loved the little kid at reception who said goodbye to us and gave us a lolly travel bag... Soo cute!! Cabin was clean and roomy.. lots of activities.. pool is  great for the kids.. beach is beautiful.. i 100% recommend this place

Me and my friend went there to just have a swim and we weren’t staying there but we really wanted to go for a spa so se went down when my mum dropped us of we got a seat and this worker came up to us and said are you guys staying here what’s your room number who are you meeting what there name and I understand that it’s the rules and we left but she was really rude about it
Excellent stay and clean throughout. BBQ to beach, not to be beaten, and great staff!
Great place to unwind . Park and location very nice
Loved the position of the villa, stones throw away from the beach , villa was roomy and clean.

Great caravan park that is dog friendly. with access to the beach and has a very nice little calf at the end which is great for our morning coffee or snacks.
Has a great pool area with different sections for different age kids also has mini golf and little playgrounds throughout.
The only thing that lets this caravan park down are the amenities they are a bit dated however there is no family rooms or big shower areas which makes it hard for showering little ones.
Also a shade sale over the jumping pillow would be handy just said the little ones don’t get burnt. I would recommend and we will definitely will return.

Our beachfront villa has two bedrooms and two bathrooms and everything you could need for a very comfortable stay. Kitchen facilities allow for self catering. Quality air con which was really needed today. Playgrounds and pool allow options to engage little ones. Office staff are lovely and helpful.

Such a fantastic holiday park!  We all had the best time there. So much to do as well as being relaxing. Awesome pool area, facilities, great cabin. We had a small budget one which we love. So nicely decorated and very clean and comfortable. Very happy and helpful staff. We're coming back for about our 16th time.
Thanks for a great holiday One Mile.
Kids loved the bunk bed, great location, great beach, great reception.

Mauvaise expérience. Des enfants qui passent à  vélo a toutes vitesse sur votre emplacement. A la piscine, le spa rempli d'enfants et d'adolescents - une vingtaine !
3 personnes qui ont parlé bruyamment et bu de 10pm à 1:20am dans la cuisine du camping, juste a côté de notre emplacement. Le personnel ne fait pas bien respecter les règles
Great family weekend. Right beside a perfect family beach. Cabin was well equipped with everything needed. Would highly recommend.  We travelled up from Sydney,  will be back.
깨끗하고 쾌적한 환경, 다만 캐러밴 간에 간격이 다소 좁음

Great beach access

Such a relaxing place to stay with family for a family holiday. We visited for a week and loved it. So much activities around to do while you stay. The pool was fantastic with slide. Mini golf was amazing. Staff helpful if we needed anything, even gave our girls free icecream.

Stayed in the premium villa, great amenities and close to the beach entrance

Check in was a bit late, the room was not ready in time , given it was the long weekend.  however the customer service was still great

We stayed in a wonderful 2 bedroom cabin. It was clean and very comfortable, the beds were great. The staff were friendly and the park itself was lovely.

We love One Mile Ingenia, so much that we go back annually now!! We stay at the Family Villas (2 kids and 3 children) right on the beach and they are well appointed and perfectly located to the beach. One Mile beach is such a beautiful location and only 2.5 hours from Sydney - highly recommend!
Top spot for a family holiday
Nice beach access, fab vibe, it must be such a great company.
Excellent park. Great staff. Direct access to patrolled beach.
Great holiday park well priced only downfall was beds were extremely soft and we only got 2 towels for a room for 5 people the beach is a lovely spot
The best place I always going there every year
Well-maintained facilities and grounds, friendly and accommodating staff, clean and updated cabins and a great location!
Excellent accommodation and facilities. We enjoyed a very comfortable 2 day stay here, whilst hiking the wonderful Tomaree Coastal Walk.

We had a fabulous weekend with our grandson 4 year old,  who is constantly on the go. He was exhausted by the end of the day with all of the swimming and sand castle building not to mention the pedal quad bikes. Best holiday ever, his words. Thank you.....

Excellent stay at this lovely caravan park. Staff were extremely help, offering to help peg in our caravan awning if the ground was too firm. Very clean and a very short walk to the beach. Would definitely visit again! Thank you!
Gr8 for a mid week family catch up!
Excellent stay! Will keep coming back! Kids and adults had the best weekend
GreaThe family facilities

We stayed in a Luxury Safari Tent and had a fabulous time!! The location right on the beach is perfect and the pool and mini golf was a lot of fun for our family. They seemed to have a great variety of cabins and sites for all campers. The cafe next door is awesome too.
The kids had a ball, lots to do. Clean cabins and got everything you need. We had the best weekend!
Incredibly friendly staff, facilities well maintained and plenty of things to do for the kids!

Campsites are packed in tightly and on a busy weekend those website pictures of open grass are converted to wall to wall trucks and vans with loud music and TVs. I arrived after dark due to car troubles and found that my campsite was right up against the entrance to the toilet block with all its noise and bathed in its bright fluorescent light. Worst site I’ve ever seen. I called the after hours number and they offered several alternative sites. Sadly I found them all cramped and noisy and preferred to drive another hour in the dark to something better. Seems lots of people liked that environment but not me. I’ve stayed at other big brand holiday parks and busy Nat Park campsites quite happily but this one was just too many people and too much gear in too small a space for my taste.

Just spent one night here while traveling from Sydney to Brisbane. What a fantastic find! We (my husband and I) were in one of the budget cabins and it was just perfect. Plenty of room, hot water, air con etc. A really lovely touch was milk in the fridge on our arrival and a second lovely touch was a little packet of sweets to share on our departure. Really friendly and helpful staff. I’m only sorry we only had one night as we didn’t get to use the pool or cafe. It was quiet after dark (apart from the thunder, lightening and torrential rain!) and we were very cosy. Highly recommend this site.

Delightful stay, three nights glamping. Met up with Army Mates, all of us staying at Ingenia, One Mile Beach.
Folk who run this establishment are very thoughtful and welcoming. We would happily stay again.
Wonderful stay. Kids loved the pool and right near the beach

Weekend was busy, lots of family and kids, Saturday afternoon had a band, bar and wood fire pizza's.  Come Monday park was near empty, very quite,  beautiful beach 60 meters over the sand dune, amanties very clean

Great holiday park conveniently located within a short distance to the attractions around Port Stephens. The cabins are well designed, comfortable and have all the the comfort of home. The staff are very professional and helpful. The park is on One Mile beach convenient for those who like swimming, fishing, surfing or jst relaxing on the beach or going for a stroll.
Great spot for little kids and family's, beach is perfect. Very expensive for the facilities provided, cheaper to buy plane tickets and go North somewhere.

Beautiful spot if the world.  A short walk to a patrolled beach that seemed quite sheltered from the windy conditions elsewhere. There's an excellent walk from the beach over to Boat Harbour, but be warned, the last leg is a bit tricky and not suitable for all.

Excellent camp kitchen facilites are dotted around the park that include eating areas for large groups. The roads are reasonably flat and smooth, which makes it ideal for the kids to ride bikes, scooters or the hired carts...but be careful as there are many blind spots and the kids do ride much faster than walking pace.

There are endless amounts of activites in the park and if you come prepared, there shouldn't be any reason to leave the park by car.  Just relax and have fun.

The sites, I imagine would be quite squishy during peak season, although there are larger sites for the bigger vans, so make sure you get the one that best suits your requirements.

Staff are friendly and were very accommodating.  There were a few feral people that messed up the toilets.  I did feel that the park management should have jumped on this much quicker.

Apart from the toilet incident, it is one of my favourite spots.  We will definitely be back
Quality and service, as expected. Good, amenities. Kids play area, pool. Have stayed several times and will keep returning. Easy access to patrolled beach.
Great staff, Great views, Great Accommodation

We had an amazing stay at Ingenia Holidays One Mile Beach in the glamping tent! It was spotless, beautifully set up, and had everything you could possibly need – even an air fryer, so we didn’t have to bring a thing. The staff were super friendly, the park has fantastic facilities, and being right on the beach is unbeatable. Such a perfect spot for a relaxing getaway – we’ll definitely be back!
We had a great stay! Highly recommend the beach tents, the set up inside and out are beautiful! Can’t wait to return!

Booked 2 sites side by side. Given 2 sites diagionslly opposite each other. Park was not busy and we were put beside families with kids... told we could have moved sites but we had already set up... park has great facilities.

We'll definitely be back in warmer weather 🌤 😎
it was a great stay the staff are very friendly, our cabin was clean and had amenities we need, will definitely be going back
Management and staff are willing to assist and make our stay a good one. Management (Chris)was  polite and courteous.

Stayed a week in a pet friendly cabin in August. The cabin was great and toasty. It had everything we needed including a wonderful shower. Part amenities were plentiful and well maintained. I would definitely come back.

We had a lovely stay in a cabin, the place was super clean and the bathroom was modern. We had a small kitchen with everything needed to cook. The staff are kind and location amazing right on the beach, thank you!
Ingenia holiday park one mile beach 頗方便，附近有超市，可購買食品回去享用。服務好，入住時已準備好一切。

We had 2 nights in a budget cabin while we did the Tomaree Coastal Walk. Great location for us - bus stop out the front. Limited food options but easy to get to Anna Bay. The bus gets you everywhere on the peninsula. Lovely staff here - super friendly. Quiet location. Cabin basic but very clean, comfortable and warm and well appointed. Nice products in the bathroom. Bed was super comfy - great pillows.

Had a fantastic stay in the 2 bedroom deluxe cabin for the weekend. The cabin was spacious, well equipped and extremely clean! This was our third stay at Ingenia One Mile and there is a reason we keep coming back! Great park
Beautiful
Very efficient check in and the cabin has everything we needed. The direct access to the one mile beach is a bonus. A very nice stay.
Nice accommodation
Great stay!
Good price and excellent service, very helpful and friendly.
Great location. Fabulous people working there. Great cabin.
very comfortable house, clean and Tidy. very nice for family.Everything is included well inside the house

Very nice staff, clean toilets, clean streets, lots of amenities for every age, beautiful laying as ur next to a beach.

It's 8 minute away from the Marina, so it's a convenient location if you would like to go for dolphin/whale watching.
There are several access to one mile beach.
The bbq area is nice and clean. We cooked there n enjoy our meals in the cabin

Drove 5 hrs from out west to take a break . On booking 4 day staycation we checked if both park and beach dog friendly and found as per google search  both where. On arrival reception staff informed us park was dog friendly but beach strictly no dogs . To make it even worse park outside of the van park was also strictly no dogs . So we came on vacation to have to hop in car to drive to beach to be able to  n enjoy our time away. The park was also full of ibis and the sites where very cramped and difficult to navigate 22 foot caravan . Hence we left and headed north to a park and beach we know and can enjoy our time away. So if you have a dog and like to go to beach this is not the park for you.

Nice cabin, well equipped kitchen, well appointed and clean grounds. However, various parts of the cabin were poorly maintained and made the holiday experience less than adequate. Couldn't lock front door security screens with a key due to poor maintenance, sliding front door was difficult to lock from the inside due to poor maintenance, dining room lights didn't provide consistently bright illumination, one kitchen cupboard didn't close properly due to poor maintenance, a kitchen drawer handle fell off when drawer was opened due to poor maintenance, several windows were hard to open due to zero maintenance and mold was present throughout tiled areas of shower and on several blinds, and the dvd player did always function properly. I also couldn't find a facilities - service directory within the cabin. When I dropped off the key to reception at departure, no one asked me how things went with my stay, nor thanked me for my business. Not recommended.

The best kept park we’ve stayed in

Loved our luxury tent stay over a long weekend enjoyed with friends. The tents had most of what we needed - super spacious and comfortable.

Great location — right next to the beach, which was perfect for a relaxing stay. The two-bedroom cabin was clean, spacious, and had everything we needed. Only small issue was that the internet wouldn’t work on the TV, but overall it was a great place to stay. Would definitely return!

Wonderful four night stay with extended family. Cabin was spotless. Beds super comfy, great hot water and aircon. All amenities we needed. Just next to the beach which was great for the grandchildren. They also made great use of the putt putt golf, carts, guessing competitions. All staff we met always had a smile and friendly greeting.

Really lovely park with lovely staff. Nice quiet location but short drive to local shops, cafes, pub etc. Nelson bay is a short 7 minute drive. Really lovely vibe about the park, neat, clean and friendly. Highly recommend!

One of the cleanest places I’ve stayed in Australia. The service was excellent, and the cabins are well-structured and fully equipped. An amazing experience overall. Best place ever

Went for business and hoped to have time leftover to look around did not. Pictures of cabin not the same as one i got was ok but do think it was misleading. not the best value.

What a wonderful little caravan park so close to the beach and with a bus stop right at the gate. We spent one night in a budget cabin while doing the Tomaree Coastal Walk which we really recommend. Whales were fantastic. The cabin was spotless and so much more than we expected from “budget”. Staff were friendly and very helpful from booking to checkout. We hope to visit again someday.

Had a really nice 2 night stay in one of their "Budget Studio Cabins".
It was a perfect cabin for the two of us. The cabin is cozy, with a bed and kitchenette in the main room, bathroom in another room and a second room with bunk beds.
Everything was exceptionally spotless and clean. The kitchenette was fully stocked and had everything (including an air fryer) however, not an oven.
We really appreciated that the heat pump was on when we checked in on a cold evening.
The property grounds are large and feature caravan sites and sites to set up a tent. The beach is a right next to the property and it was so nice to wake up early and walk over to have a coffee on the beach to watch the sunrise.
Other amenities include tennis courts, basketball courts, a bouncy pad thing for kids as well as a pool.
Overall a really nice place to stay, I would definitely recommend a budget cabin room for a couple seeking a cozy stay in the area.
Absolutely loved staying and visiting family here, peaceful environment with the beach just 100 metres away

It was simple to book, great communication, great location for the family and the cabin was so perfect for our needs. They went above and beyond to make things more comfortable, it's the little things that are appreciated. Friendly service. Thank you for a wonderful stay!
Very friendly and helpful staff
Nice and clean looking forward to see again
Very relaxing, ⛱️ easy access to the Beach, lots of activities and BBQ facilities
Good service…even late check in will email how to get the key

its alright I guess
We had an amazing time. Fantastic park and wonderful staff that go out of there way to help. We will be back

We only stopped one night but wished we could stay longer. Beautiful, clean site, with great amenities. We had a camper van and enjoyed an ensuite site. The beach is amazing and only a short stroll through the bush from the grounds. Planning o. Returning in summer!
Great park at a beautiful beach. All the staff were so kind and helpful. Park and accommodation was very clean.

Ingenia Holiday Park was great place to stay.
Hospitality was amazing. It was close to beach for good experience. House with all necessary things like WIFI, AC, TV, Fridge, microwave, water boiler, etc. Cafe is also available inside the venue for 10-4pm. I had my wonderful coffee at morning. Everything at same place. I tried to book tent house for amazing experience but due to bad weather I couldn’t. Gonna visit again soon.
I liked this hotel. The room was very clean and just like the photos. It’s very close to Anna Bay, and the room has a kitchen and a sofa. It was an enjoyable stay!
Byron for a month just surfing and chilling.
Good for price. Perfect location. Good facilities. Swimming pool, game room, tennis court, BBQ areas…. One mile beach is just behind it! There are dog friendly cabins which is a plus.

Great location, well maintained facilities and very accomodating and friendly office and ground staff. Enjoyed my stay.

Exceeded Our Expectations!!!
My wife and I booked the luxury glamping tents and OMGoodness.. we were surprised at just how lovely and comfortable (with all the mod/conveniences) it was!

Absolutely loved it and will definitely be booking again.  (Soon) 😃

We had a really great time at Ingenia One Mile Beach because of very helpful and friendly staffs. It was pouring rain when we booked Ingenia One Mile Beach. Staffs did all they could to make our holiday memorable. Thank you team Ingenia One Mile Beach. Much appreciated.
We have been coming at Easter for years and absolutely love it!!  Great staff, fun activities and beautiful location. Many, many happy memories made here!
Well presented and maintained caravan park. Close to beach.
A great park for families. Has so much to do and the beach is amazing and so close. Swimming pool could be warmer but overall a top choice.

出入方便 设施齐全；服务态度友善礼貌。
