Terrible service very very rude and mean called me and my sister a liar and kicked us out when we were doing no harm and waiting for our cousins to come out of their cabins would never come here again DO NOT RECOMMEND EVER ESPECIALLY CAUSE OF THE SERVICE and that one guy at reception that had kicked us out and called us a liar before we were even there for 20 minutes
Hel fijne camping! Alle voorzieningen aanwezig en op loopafstand van het Koala Ziekenhuis en het strand
Great caravan Park with plenty of things for the kids. Just a short walk to One Mile Beach, Koala Park and a cafe with great coffee.

Wonderful park, staff were very friendly upon arrival and helped answer our questions with clear communication.||Site was a slab with astro turf alongside which was perfect for keeping the van clean. Location is central with pizzas and pub just down the road.  Beachside cafe is located, via a gate  at the rear of the park and has great coffee in the morning.  Amenities are clean and tidy.  BBQs are plentiful and the patrolled beach is nice and close||

Wow! Wasn’t expecting to find a cabin like this! It’s large, modern, clean, has great tv reception, Foxtel, a sunny deck and a spa bath. It is beautifully decorated and is actually better than what is shown in the advertising photos. Parking is right beside the cabin which makes access easy. The lorikeets love all the trees in the park. Bird noise - love it! |The swimming pool is large and has lots of sun beds available. While our cabin was pet friendly, the beach is not which is disappointing. A great little find. We’ll be back.
We had a great stay here. The 3 bedroom cabin was ideal, we stayed with a large group and the site were close and the service was great.

Stopped in here as a last minute accomodation and it was lovely! Beautiful almost private beach, cabins were clean and spacious, very friendly staff. Our cabin had everything you would need for a family holiday. None of the beds were very comfortable but not an issue for a short stay. Highly recommend!
Excellent location and customer service.
Very clean, good set up. One of the better ingenia parks I have been to. Lots of activities, mini golf, go karts, beach, surfing, nice cafe, playgrounds, lovely swimming pool with spa.
The two bedroom cabin was a good size, nice renovated bathroom, the rest of it needed a good reno still, cabins are packed in pretty close but quiet. Kinda expensive we thought
Very pleasant holiday camp with loads of options and facilities. Really enjoyed our stay.
Reception really helpful , visual inspection of room upon arrival is a must as we had to change due to cleanliness . Be wary of locals coming in to use pool.

We had a great time at this campground. We booked the budget 2 bed cabin and it was super clean and well equipped, with a lovely covered deck for relaxing. Kids loved the pool, go karts and the resident possum! A short walk to a fantastic beach with lifeguards. BBQs were always clean with cloths and soap for washing up, clean and tidy BBQ area. The grounds are well maintained and looked after, we were impressed! We will be back!

I booked this Deluxe luxury villa for a weekend away with my Grandchildren. I paid almost 1,400 dollars for the two nights. The bed linen in the king bedroom was bloodstained so we were not able to use this bedroom. The bbq was on its last legs dirty and rusty. The overall cleanliness of the villa was dismal. So disappointed with the cabin 156 I could have cried. I wish I’d researched it better before parting with the money I’d saved . The description on the website is not a true representation of this accommodation.

We booked a deluxe luxury villa for a weekend with our three young grandchildren. We paid almost $1,350 for the two nights. Our cabin 156 was very dirty and tired. There were bloodstained linens on the king bed linen which meant we only used two of the beds. The bbq was on its last legs rusty and grubby. The overall cleanliness was awful. We were so disappointed and may as well have booked a budget cabin!! To call it deluxe was not a true representation of this cabin.
The room equipment is old, the air conditioner and the fan are full of black dust. The bed is comfortable.
Great spot at One Mile beach. Nice relaxing resort style pool. Easy beach access and next to surf club. Dog friendly.

I booked a place here last minute following a dreadful experience (with no sleep!) down the road at Melelueca Surfside Backpackers hostel.

Literally the same day I was able to book a small cabin just for the night and was so pleased with my experience: from the easy, early check-in I was able to have, friendliness and great communication from the staff, all the amenities you get (kitchenette, toiletries, towels etc.), the cleanliness, comfort and overall value of the experience - I couldn't fault it! It was an absolute dream to stay at Ingenia, One Mile and a real retreat for a weary solo traveler!

We stayed for a week in a budget cabin and absolutely loved our time at One Mile. The location is great, you’ve got a choice of the beach or the pool. Both are great for kids, the jumping pillow, and the playgrounds at the bbq areas are a great idea! There are adequate bins and facilities all around the park, which is not common in a lot of holiday parks!
The daily text message letting us know what the activities for the day were a nice touch.
You certainly pay a premium rate at this time of year, but we definitely enjoyed the stay.
The cabin wasn’t perfectly clean when we arrived, but I assume there is a tight turnaround with the busy periods, people coming in and out.
All in all, a great trip, I will probably get a deluxe cabin next time, as they look a lot more spacious.
砂丘の4wdツアーとサーフィンのために訪れました。サーフィンにはとてもいい場所です。歩いて1-2分でビーチです。またイルカの群れを見ることが出来ました。

I was really disappointed with my experience at One Mile Beach. We rented a pedal cart for an hour, but less than five minutes, another child jumped onto our cart without permission and the cart was taken off us. The lady said she was going to refund the money then she changed her mind. I wouldn’t have been too upset if she refunded us the money. It’s a shame because I was really looking forward for my 2-year-old to have fun on Australia Day. A clearer policy upfront would have been helpful.
Fantastic service
Location is perfect, right on the beach, but the rest is not. Overcrowded, amenities always busy. Camp kitchen with one sink, broken kettle and dirty toaster. Not coming back.

Nice location, nice staff, but the owners are greedy as hell! I guess they use that dynamic price algorithm and we’re screwed. I booked unpowered site last year a month before and got 110 aud price- terrible! We are first time in Aus and booked all our 18 days trip campsites in advance. So had no choice. And for that price you get really nothing special including broken kettle and dirty toaster in the kitchen.

Our family have just spent this week in cabin and in van. Great location. Well supported for families. Internal roads are narrow but if your not confident in parking your van they have tractor help. Stay cut short due to massive storms and power outage in complete shire for 2 days.

Wir haben hier mit dem Camper geparkt, deshalb kann ich die Zimmer nicht beurteilen. Ein super schöner und moderner Ferienpark, die sanitären Anlagen für Camper sind sehr sauber und man hat eine tolle Lage direkt am Strand.

Really bad experience very un polite staff.
Also Pet friendly very unwell explained.

I’ve stayed at Ingenia One Mile Beach before with my child, and we absolutely loved it! The pool and splash area were such a hit, keeping us entertained for hours. The direct walk-through to the beach is so convenient and makes it easy to enjoy the stunning coastline. This place is incredibly family-friendly, with a welcoming atmosphere and plenty of activities for kids. I highly recommend it for a fun and relaxing family getaway!

Very convenient location. Unfortunately, facilities management is extremely poor. The pool is FILTHY and chemically imbalanced. Extremely opaque and cloudy. Full of floaties. Caused allergic reactions and extreme itchiness after. Repeatedly. Unacceptable for a public facility, especially after reporting it on Day 1.

Mini Golf is very B Grade.
Jumping pillow okay.
Playgrounds tiny and for tiny kids.

Cabin fans full of accumulated dust - clearly never cleaned.

Kitchen facilities too basic - no small sharp knife or cutting board. Supplied frypan totally warped and took 30min to cook bacon - had to buy another one.

Wifi was unusable (streaming didn’t work at all, and was too slow and painful even for normal browsing) and 4G/5G reception was 1-2 bars with contention high enough that the carriers were kicking off hotspotting or preventing it entirely. The latter is out of their control, but the former is clearly being too cheapskated to actually have sufficient bandwidth for that many people.

Hot water lasted 3 minutes.

Comfy bed and decent aircon.

But very very average.

Great location, was full of good people during our stay. The amenities were the cleanest I have ever seen in a place like this, particularly during the peak season. The check-in wasn't until 1pm (check out time was 10am) and while we were packing up our tents, the new guests arrived which made us rush up a bit which is the only thing I would suggest being mindful of.
Fabulous beach, nice stay
Excellent place. Kids friendly, have a pool and a lots of other kids activities. Beach was just 5 min walking. Lots of cicadas around so had to be careful when opening doors.

Contact our friendly staff so we can take 20% off of 4 nights at an overpriced craphole. Some ppl are easily impressed for what they pay these days, smh, it's a holiday park nothing more nothing less, lolololol.

The park itself is actually really nice. However, it’s full of prepubescent children all trying to outdo each other on bikes, e-scooters and playing up until midnight, screaming through Campervan windows and knocking doors. The park staff really need to get a grip on what they will and won’t accept.

CANCEL YOUR BOOKING!!!!
20th of December, women’s bathroom facilities… every toilet seat had no.2s on it (and not just a little bit!) this was enough for us to know we won’t be coming back. Shower walls have mould. Bathrooms do not get cleaned frequently enough to cope for the parks peak Christmas period. Unpowered sites are on a sloping uneven ground which consists of dead grass, sand and dust making it a hellish time with the strong southerly winds coming straight off the sand dunes and blowing absolutely everywhere! The pool you can’t even get into as there’s about 100 people in there at all times. Enormous groups of international families have booked every site and cabin taking up the entire park, setting up their own cookers smoking the place out and taking over total occupancy of the facility’s ie camp kitchen, bbq areas, pool, bathrooms you can’t even use the amenities unless your with these huge groups! It’s a horrible time do not come!
Enjoyed our stay. A few issues the park needs to address re the rooms etc, but other than that, great location.

They gave us site number 213 but we can't pitch our tents here because there is a stone and all our nails are bent and the other campers helped us and said there is a big stone here because we couldn't hammer the nails in but they still gave us this place
Great location and great experience. The manager was really friendly and helpful. Definitely stay there again.

Very friendly stuff. Perfect located near to the beach. Clean facilities.
Be aware that there are a lot of families with their kids so it can be very enlivened place.

We have just finished travelling the east coast and this was by FAR our favourite campsite of them all. It’s in such a great location, right next to the beach and a short drive to the shops and restaurants. The facilities here are modern and very clean, it seems a great place for families with small children too.
Our only regret is not staying longer!

Fantastic place. Staff are very friendly and helpful.
Cabins are clean, fresh, and  stylish. Would definitely be back here again.
15 out of 10 if we could.
Wonderful small part with all family oriented facilities,  walking to beach and fun in pool. Love to visit again
Cabin needed a renovation but was clean and had everything needed. Campsite facilities are great. Perfect for kids
The location is amazing! We could hear the waves from our tent!
Great caravan park. Good amenities. Well located near beach accesses.

What a wonderful place this is. We came at the end of the school holidays and had a great time. Very clean amenities and park. Fabulous and helpful staff. I’m a solo mum and the kind maintenance man helped with my annex and trailer. A minute walk to the beautiful beach. My boy loved the activities, pool and jumping pillow. We will return again for sure. :)

Ammendies discussing no way they are cleaned several times daily ,sanitary bins overflowing .
Please fix the key pads for safety.

Absolutely disgusted, amenities are extremely filthy, I walk into the women’s restroom to see someone had decided to take a dump in the shower and didn’t bother to clean it up or bring this to the attention of staff. Alongside this, a variety of bathroom stalls were also unable to be used due to the explosive diarrhea splattered everywhere. I don’t think I’ve ever seen a more disgusting, filthy bathroom which seems to not be cleaned on a regular basis. The park was extremely busy during our stay, almost impossible to drive through the sea of children on bikes and electric scooters. The pool was bustling with hundreds of children and the hot tub absolutely packed, the water in both the pool and the hot tub was cloudy. People also tend to sneak into the hot tub at night.
Facilities here are exceptional. Overall wholesome environment and perfect for the family. The beach here is also 👌🏼
Easy park to find, top location, good van site, easily stayed hitched up for the night & a lovely cafe nearby!

Stayed at the two bedrooms standard cabin, the place is clean, walking distance to the beach. (less than 3 mins). Kid loved the jumping pillow and the mini golf. Unfortunately, we didn't get to enjoy the pool but it looked clean. The cabin got the perfect patio in front where we spent a relaxing afternoon.
Location, short driving distsnce to the shops.
The holiday part seemed clean as well.
Don't need to make your own bed or remove the linens when u check in and out.
It's a good place to stay for family. We went during weekday so it was quiet, not sure about weekends.

Stop don't book
We're here 9 days and before we booked we called to ask if we can select a site and we were told yes however after we booked online and called back to request a site, we're told that we have been given the last spot.
Ok, so check in and place is empty and we're given an awkward site that doesn't fit our van.
The place is noisy as hell with construction right next to us.
We would be forgiving if staff were upfront and clear with us when we called before we booked, that's proper service..... honesty with the customer.
Anyway don't book if you are looking for peace, you're not going to get it, there's construction everywhere.

PS - We're definitely here, as per photo
Overall was a nice quiet spot, but the room wasn't 100% cleaned from staff, there was hair in the bathroom, rubbish still in cupboards, other then that it was nice
Nice & Affordable...easy walk to the beach!
Big Caravan Park just would be better site away from the main road

Its like a colony of cabins with all basic facilities required. Wonderful place for kids with play activities. Its amazing for adults too. It sits just by the side of one mile beach. When i visited, the weather was amazing and i could find my peace. Beach is very beautiful .

Very clean, tidy cabin and pet friendly too. Nice, quiet location  near the beach, with plenty of family activities, pool, Mini golf, bikes and carts, jumping castle and more. Close to shops and a fabulous Cafe, on-site too. Highly recommend this location for family caravans and camping.
Recently stayed at Ingenia Holiday, had a fantastic experience. The park was impeccably clean and customer service was exceptional. The location was ideal, offering easy access to the One Mile Beach.

Kids had a great time. Heaps of facilities and activities onsite for kids of all ages. Able to plan out where we would like to book so that we were able to stay near friends so all the kids could play together easily.
Private Island, ingenia holidays? No difference, go now.
Great spot for a getaway, right on the beach and close to venture out also. Super clean and tidy with awesome staff. 10/10 would recommend.

Must visit place for Holiday.My daughter fav George cockatoo bird.
Plenty of activity for kids and best view of beach.
We'll be back again.

Ingenia Holidays One Mile Beach offers a serene and well-maintained retreat near Port Stephens, with comfortable cabins and caravan sites. Its proximity to One Mile Beach provides easy access to a beautiful coastline perfect for surfing and relaxation. The park's amenities, including a pool and barbecue areas, cater to both families and travelers seeking a peaceful getaway in nature.

Stayed for a couple of nights in a budget cabin.
Judging by The dust on the fans and picture above the bed it's obvious there's no dusting done
Otherwise it was good,as the oven etc was very clean.
Good place for a break

The cabins were well presented and more than adequate for a weekend stay. Well situated near the beach, good surf beach and on the route of the Tomaree Coastal Walk. Despite the torrential overnight rains the walk was completed in sunny conditions, nice to come back to a warm cabin.

Great overnight stay for family of 5.

We stayed as part of a larger trip but really wanting to go back and stay much longer amount of time.

Beach was manned with life guards in school holidays so great for those avid tween surfers.

Very clean and friendly staff. You can tell the owners look after the place.

Must stay in our opinion

🤩🤩🤩🤩🤩.
The service and locations is great.

Spent a week here with 2 young kids and we loved it, great location, jumping pillow and playgrounds for kids, pool/spa. Plenty of stuff to see and do around the location. Reception was more then happy to upgrade our budget cabin booking to the premium villa 3b for a great price! Left a item in the villa and they contacted me to let me know and are sending it to us at home. 10/10 customer service, would recommend!
Great place to stay clean and tidy
The cabin was clean, tidy and comfortable. We were very happy with our stay.

Super schöner und super sauberer Ferienpark mit sehr freundlichem Personal. Waren als Paar (55/54) mit Camper Van Mitte Juni 2024 dort. Tagsüber ca. 17 Grad, nachts ca. 9 Grad, ab 17 Uhr dunkel, was uns aber nicht gestört hat. Wir hatten die große Ferienanlage fast für uns alleine. Die direkte Lage zum Strand ist super. Auch im australischen Winter eine Reise wert.

Can't fault it... Great swimming pool, all facilities are in very good conditions and always will maintained. Security is always present and quick to attend to requests. Gorgeous clean beach with plenty of the kids to do.

great place to stay, next to one mile beach which is easily accessible. a bunk bed and queen size bed, great for us family of 4. Just a note for the bunk beds we had to do the linens ourselves. Happen to see a civet cat as well outside my unit.
Very well maintained and the staff are amazing. Was extremely happy with the price I paid and what the place had offer.

Just stayed 3 nights for a little family getaway and it was amazing. The whole park is very clean, quiet, and peaceful with easy access to a beautiful beach out back. And the facilities around the park are just great, with a whole variety of games, rentals, a swimming pool, and a spa.
The cabins were also very cozy, but were a bit dirty and could use a few more electricity outlets. And the utensils in the kitchen also weren’t cleaned properly. Other than that the place was golden.

Staff found it and returned it to me, thank you.
We checked out after 9 AM and when we got home and started unpacking in the afternoon, we realized that our child had left the iPad behind. We called to ask if they had seen it, but they said no. It must have been taken by someone, as we didn’t use it anywhere else. This has been a very unpleasant experience, Just wanted to let you know to make sure you keep your belongings safe there. In the past, even if we accidentally left something behind, it would be found and returned. This time, we are very disappointed.

We stayed at the park for 3 nights and it absolutely amazing. We had a great time there. There are enough equipment to keep the kids entertained. The staff are kind. The location is great, close to everything. Highly recommend.
Great place to stay. Staff are friendly. 4 stars given due to main bedroom walls being too dusty and second bedroom being too small, otherwise a really nice place to stay for a young family.
Nice and quiet campsite at a wonderful beach with superb food at the Besch Cafe.

Not a complaint, for some of us it was our second time there and for others our first.
We loved the cabin, great space for 6 (3A, 3C). Close to everything.
We just were upset that we had to make up 4/5 beds. That's the last thing we wanted to do after travelling all day to get there.
wonderful
All good thanku
Great location and decent space, was camping so can't say much about the rooms or service.

Ingenia One Mile is amazing. So close to one of the best beaches of Port Stephens. The holiday park has everything you need and so much more. The community centre is amazing and so clean. The pool was so much fun even in June my daughter still went swimming. The cabin we stayed in felt like home. Can not wait until we visit again.
Access to the beach. Not suitable for good beach fishing but good for swimming.
Perfect place to holiday with the kids or not

We had a powered caravan site, nice park, came back after about 25 years with grandchild. Pool rules and bike riding rules not enforced. Parents in pool are drinking alcohol and glass when signs clearly say not allowed. Kids running, bombing and basically climbing over the top of little ones in the baby pool, roads being used as racing tracks with kids on bikes with no helmets. I’m not trying to be a Scrooge but it was dangerous. Security guards patrolling Friday night still had no control over some kids. The management should be looking at doing something about it and parents really need to take responsibility instead of ignorance because it really spoiled not just our stay but others we spoke to. Sorry but we won’t be back. Also expensive at $79 for a Friday night. Just for a powered site.

Love the experience of living in cabins. The interior of the older cabins looks like as though it has time freeze to 1990s. Nothing wrong with that and we love the nostalgic feel. They have newer cabins and tents. The whole accommodation area is quiet. We managed to also catch the stars at night. The place is not as pack as other places that offers cabins stay. For those looking at just 2 to 3 nights of stay, I would recommend this place. However if you wish to stay longer than 3 nights, consider getting a room that's bigger than cabin.
A quick overnight stay in one of the glamping tents.  Gorgeous setup and everything you need and only a short stroll to beach.

Great facilities, great location, very expensive, Rooms were not very clean, bathroom was gross, WAY TOO MANY PEOPLE, if you want a nice quiet relaxed holiday this park IS NOT the one to go too. Hundreds of disrespectful children, no noise allowed after 10 but was woken every morning before 7am by noisy kids on bikes and scooters

Only stayed one night as a stopover but would love to come back and stay a few days. Great access the beach, especially handy if you surf; great pool with a hot jacuzzi, which out toddler loved; the cabin was well equipped. The only thing if the mozzie screen door had a hole, which needs to be fixed. We stayed Sun to Mon, so it was nice and quiet but I imagine much busier on weekends.

Fantastic location. Clean amenities. Everything looks to have been revamped recently or getting upgraded. Great facilities for kids, multiple easy access to the beach, and a cocktail bar above the beach kiosk that does a pretty decent margie
We have another wonderful time as a whole family grandparents included
I usually love my experience but this time three rooms in my cabin had no working lights and there was a dead cockroach in one of the rooms, just little things they could fix
Went on a small xmas holiday but very hot and alot of mozzies but had fun

One Mile Beach holiday park is a great place to have a holiday, either with a partner or with a family. It has many cabins, a Resort style pool,  heaps of other activities on site, and a surf beach just a short stroll away. It doesn't get much better than this. I thoroughly recommend this place..Oh and did I mention the friendly and helpful staff as well??

We where super lucky to get a space late December because of a cancellation. RV stand with on suite was clean and very neat.
The locals was friendly, the service personnel was really friendly and helpful.
The beach is beautiful and huge, we would recommend this space to anyone who likes to camp or book a chalet.

Great location and great activities for kids run by the Camp-site. Only let down was the state of the camp sites, majority of the turf was in poor condition and very sandy. The Camp-sites could do with new turf or Artificial turf.
Great park as we have been there on many occasions but the rooms can be cleaner and the security were quite rude to our children on a few occasions.

Disgusting cabin.
There was poop in the toilet  when we arrived.
The floor is not really clean.
The pictures on the website are misleading. What a disappointment.

Unfortunately with a beautiful location and great caravan park filled with great facilities for kids the park manager and the security manager have no respect and manners at ALL! . Also the house and cabins are only surface cleaned.  Many family members children were continuously  picked on, while other children doing the same thing was OK!.
This place is awesome, nice park right on the beach. We loved our week we stayed will be back again.

Overall, it's a really good holiday park.
However, I also had a bad experience.
Maybe it's not always like this, but I'm sure it's something to pay attention to.

The water in the pool was incredibly dirty.
Even young children pooped, and their mother washed the child's butt in the spa.
I've seen a lot of people fail to abide by these, despite the guidance of not being allowed to eat, jump, or play dangerously in the pool.

People's consciousness problems are big, but something needs to be done and controlled to prevent them.

Absolutely loved our stay here. One Mile Beach is beautiful and great for kids. The pool and kids activities during school holidays were a hit with the kids. Camp site was quiet at nights, great location. The only thing that let the park down was amenities (showers and toilets) not cleaned often enough for busy school holiday period. Other than that, we recommend staying at the park and will be back.

Great location for this family friendly place! We booked two cabins for two nights for cousin's family from NZ and us. Due to popularity we were only able to book two different cabins (Spa cabin & Deluxe cabin). Prior to our arrival, a prompt text message has notified us that the cabins are available for earlier check-in which worked out perfectly due to our earlier than schedule arrival. Friendly staff kindly upgraded us to two adjecent cabins. Cabins are very clean, my husband loves the mattress where when I tossed around during the night, he's not interrupted :)

On-site facilities are also with great variety to suit all age group. Swimming pool is designed to offer great fun to kids, tennis court, basketball court and jumping pillow are a bonus.

It is located in close proximity to major tourism places such as Irukandji Stingray & Shark Encounter, Dolphin watch cruise and Sandboarding.

Overall experiences for both kids and adults were amazing. Thank you Ingenia Holidays :)

Beautiful caravan park,  walking distance to beach.  Great amenities and bbq areas.
We are an older couple and werent able to use the pool because of the great number of kids there.  Maybe you could consider an hour morning and afternoon for seniors only so we can swim or do laps without the fear of being jumped on. After all we pay the same rates as families do.
Very relaxing and enjoying the beach, swimming pool,clean grill area and possum in the night time :D

We had a fantastic stay as always,
The bbq are and camping amenities where cleaner then the cabin we stay in.
Cabin was not clean needs a lot of LAC, not nice if you have to clean the glasses and coffee cups where pretty dirty.  The deck needs repairing timber railing was giving away and the deck floor slates needs repairing aswell they where moving each time you walk along the deck and nails sticking up everything needed a good spring clean.
But over all always love the park maybe camp next time.

Amazing camping 🤩 Super equipped with everything you need and more! It has different areas where you can cook, very efficient, the toilet was clean, magnificent access to the beach, we had a really good time! Perfect for families but also a couple of friends.Highly recommended 👌

Very nice, the cabins were well kept, spacey and were a good temperature depending on the weather. As a teenager I must say the mattresses on the bunk beds are very thin and we’re very uncomfortable to sleep on. There was also a-lot of people “partying” up until 5am in the morning which I normally wouldn’t have a problem with, but the after hours rule didn’t seem to have any enforcement. Other than that the camp facilities are great, quick and easy walk to the beach and campsite is well kept and tidy.
Great caravan park. Amazing beach. Most of the amenities have been modernised. Just a few still new to be renovates.

Update review down to three stars (April 2023) - this is due to cleanliness of the cabins and applies to a stop here recently and before Christmas also.  Dust and grime - simply not cleaned to a satisfactory level, especially for the price you pay.  Must improve otherwise they will lose custom.

Great spot.  A variety of accomodation options.  Some cabins have washing machines others don't. - if you are planning to stay longer than a few days.  Great beach.  Pool is cold (spring), surprised nothing is rigged up to make it warmer (solar hot water)?  Then the young kids would really enjoy it. Warm spa gets busy, warmer pool = solution. We drove to a public pool.
Very safe and children friendly.
A Great site in a fabulous location. Would recommend
Loved the break - the prices have gone up!

Nice cabins with big verandas
Very clean   Lots of activities for kids

Great place to stay - we camped on a powered site. Facilities were excellently maintained, and very clean. Very busy, lots of kids but the park quietened down with most people respecting the "10pm no noise" rule. Staff were very easy to deal with re our booking. One small niggle - the visitors parking needs some love - very large potholes! 😃
Nice park. Dog friendly and good location. Weekday site rate I thought was expensive.
The park is great and so are the staff. More needs to be done to keep people quiet after 10pm as we had our neighbours up till all hours with loud music and singing.

I recently had the pleasure of staying in one of the glamping tents at Ingenia One Mile Beach, and it was nothing short of exceptional. From the moment I arrived, I felt like I had stepped into a tropical boho resort right by the beach.

The heated pool and spa were an absolute delight, providing the perfect way to unwind after a day of exploration. The attention to detail in every aspect of the glamping experience was evident, making it more than just a stay – it was a memorable escape.

Customer service was top-notch, with the staff going above and beyond to ensure a comfortable and enjoyable stay. They were friendly, accommodating, and genuinely invested in making the experience special.

Cleanliness is a crucial factor for me, and I was impressed by how immaculate the glamping tent was. It felt like stepping into a luxurious oasis with its own fridge, cozy beds, and every need was catered to. It's evident that the management has thought of everything to make the stay truly exceptional.

What sets Ingenia One Mile Beach apart is its outstanding location next to the beach. Waking up to the sound of the waves and having the beach just a stone's throw away added an extra layer of magic to the entire experience.

In summary, my stay at Ingenia One Mile Beach was outstanding. It's a perfect blend of comfort, style, and natural beauty. I highly recommend it to anyone looking for a unique and unforgettable getaway.

Trina Affleck

Awesome park, one of my favourite over the years.

Unfortunately there are some thiefs due to easy access and not enough cctv cover, so be ready that some of your belongings can be stolen.
Great location and big house

Stayed here for the night & it was great. So many kid friendly activities for al ages, direct beach access & even had a cafe to buy good quality meals from. Stayed in an economy cabin not luxurious but did the job for the family & had all the basic amenities needed for a short stay. Definitely coming back staff were all so lovely & welcoming. Beautiful clean well maintained park.
Great place for Great getaway
Great park plenty for kids to do, beach close enough to hear the waves at night which was very peaceful. Whole place was really well maintained!

The park was nice and clean, i was a bit disappointed that I told staff over the phone the size of my caravan and they put us on a tiny concrete site that we wouldn't have been able to unhook due to the slant in the slope and the draw bar would have been hanging over. We were lucky enough to be changed to a different site, but that may not have been the case if it was fully booked. we drove 4.5 hours away, that would have been an issue. I liked where we were moved to but i was not happy with the "grassed" area alongside the sites that were just dirt (mud by the end of it due to rain during our stay) Not fun when we had a dog, who just brought it all in the van. All in all, a good spot. sites could be a bit bigger. staff lovely and helpful.
Great site. Fully recommend.

Deluxe cabins.
Make your own beds over mattress protectors that have obviously not be changed for weeks maybe months.
A gas oven that does not self light.
Scratches on every wall.
White paint that is so old it looks yellow.
Tv remotes that don’t even work.
Couches with chunks ripped off of them.
Disgusting.
Never again

Bellissimo camping attrezzato con tutti i comfort, servizi igienici e attrezzatura per cucinare super puliti e personale molto cortese è disponibile, è situato davanti alla bellissima one mile beach lo consiglio ci siamo trovati molto bene
Great place for a nice getaway holiday really nice park , anytime if year close to all attractions , highly recommend will be back for sure 😊
Super convenient family getaway, especially in a group. Lots for the kids to do and great location right on the beach.

Great park, well looked after and amenities are very clean. Close to everything in Nelson Bay and right on the beach. Dog friendly in off peak season which is outside school holidays and long weekends.

I camped in a powered site overnight and was really impressed by the facilities and cleanliness of this park.  The bathrooms were pristine with new plumbing, the sites were well maintained, and the beach was just a short walk away.  I’ll be back!
Very 😌
Great trip, perfect for families. Only issue was the lack of hot water for 24hrs

Great place for the family, plenty to do. Great communication. Bit pricey for 2bdr cabin. Pretty basic. but obviously the going rates. Would stay again but maybe pitch a tent way cheaper and still the perks of the park itself

Beautiful holiday park with all the extras for families. The bed was a bit softer than we would like but other than that we had a lovely time. Great location next to the beach. Thanks for a great holiday, we will be back soon.
Beautiful spot, right at the beach with clean amenities. Really enjoyed our stay (powered campsite). Friendly and helpful staff. Will rebook when around again 👍🏼

Great holiday park on One Mile Beach with well maintained amenities, sites & cabins.  It has pools, tennis court, putt putt course, a massive bounce area.  There is so much to do & see in the area that you'd need a week at the least.
Budget cabin 108 looks out over a small clearing with no dwelling in front of it.  Good quiet spot.  There is a large BBQ shed / facility just in front and to one side of the cabin.

Good park with great facilities for families and kids. Walking distance to beach.

Cabin was not cleaned properly upon check-in.

I requested a cot and high chair which was not delivered as promised 3 times. Staff went home at 5pm and forgot about me. This resulted in a difficult 1st night sharing a bed with our toddler.

Service team seems understaffed and burnt out.

All my issues were resolved on day 2 of my stay. Not a great start but did end up with a good ending. Families and kids had a great time and that's what really matters.

Regardless of my initial negative experience, it's still a great place for the kids and I would still recommend.
Fantastic family holiday spot,right on the beach,and a very handy coffee/eatery nearby

Amazing park with awesome facilities. Loved the SMS's we received in the morning to let guests know what activities were planned for the day. A short easy stroll to the beach, we can't wait come back :)

We loved our stay camping here and will be returning again.
The beach is beautiful and surprisingly quiet. The facilities offered by the park are great for camping with a young family

Great place and amenities, kids had a great stay, they met some brilliant kids and made friends with them, played footy together, we also bought our own table tennis kit from Kmart and had a table tennis comp at night. It was fantastic stay.

Fantastic Caravan park! Great for families and groups as there are well maintained communal areas with bungalows to share joint meals, or keep cool under whilst baby is sleeping in the tent across the road!
It’s very gooddd
I highly recommend it
A pleasant campsite with realistic prices.

Great layout with a lot of bbq areas to use during peak times. Close access to the beach if you do not want to use any of the facilities located inside the park.
Travelled with the family and they had a ball running around and exploring safely with new friends.
Highly recommended if you looking for a nice place to stay when visiting the Bay area.
Beautiful spot. Very comfortable cabins with everything you need for a couple or family.
The glamping tents were amazing, the location and the campground facilitites top notch

Staff with an attitude. Did not bother adding my Big4 membership # even though I requested it multiple times - So had to pay 10% over. The staff member was rude and unsupportive. I will inform all my camping mates and camping social groups I follow so that they don't have to overpay like I did. Camp site - as a whole is nice, but the staff is just ruining it.

We are a senior couple and enjoyed our stay at Ingenia One Mile.  The cabin was well appointed and the park has access to One Mile beach via a back security gate, where you'll also find One Mile Cafe (5days pw)

. This park is well located if you wish to hike the beautiful Tomaree Coastal Walk (27kms) from Shoal Bay to Birubi Point, which we did.  We loved the facilities for families with children and would like to bring our own grandchildren to stay here one day.  Great pool, putt putt golf, jumping cushion, go carts, communal bbqs. Bus Stop for Bus 130 is immediately outside the park gates which will take you to Birubi Point & beyond, Anna Bay, Salamander, Shoal Bay Fingal etc if you want to leave the car behind.  Overall a very enjoyable stay.
Very well equipped and maintained caravan park in an amazing location.
Great location and facilities. The staff were very friendly and accommodating.  We stayed in our own tent and had a powered site. Will be happy to return.
Great caravan park, especially for kids.  A little off the highway but once you know about this park, you keep coming back.  Cheaper mid-week rates are en excellent enticement.
Great place to stay with family. Heaps of activities and things to do.

Don't spend your money here.
Can't sleep, these bunks are for children, the worst mattress, it feels like I'm laying on the boards, my body is in pain and I'm itching all over. I'd say it's the worst night's sleep if I could get any sleep.
We used our camper for a fantastic few nights away. The time went soooo quickly we will definitely be back.
Have stayed at One Mile quite a few times  and have found it amazing every time. All staff are extremely good in every way. Thank you Ingenia One Mile.
What a great caravan park! The facilities were always spotless and the staff are super friendly. We'll definitely be back.

It is located at the beach. The rooms are small but comfortable with everything we need. It has a jumping pillow & playground for the children. Also, a pool, mini golf, tennis and basketball. Camp kitchen and camping facilities are also available.

I would have given this a 5 star rating except for the things that are wrong in our cabin.
Friendly, helpful staff. Lots of activities for family - pool, jumping castle, minigolf, one-on-one basketball, tennis, close to beach, have a cafe for meals ( Wed to Sun), quiet and neatly kept.
Spent the night there and room was spacious. Internet connection was good
Awesome location. Lovely park with great facilities. As with most coastal accommodation, a little on the expensive side, especially for families.
Amazing location amazing facilities.
Great people. Great cabins. Booked three nights. Rebooked a fourth.

I recently spent a vacation in this epic property with my family. This is one of the most memorable trip of our lives. Everything was impeccable in terms of service, accommodation and views. I would love to visit this resort again. Thanks a ton, Ingenia Holidays :-)

Friendly locals. Nature provides the stairs to the beach. Very impressed with Ingenia One Mile. Cabins are nice, comfy and very clean. The grounds are neat and tidy. The staff are excellent, friendly and courteous. There's a great cafe/bar through the back gate. Plenty to see and do in the area. Highly recommended, would definitely stay again.
We enjoyed our stay however in future I need to enquire if there are safety rails in the toilet and shower as my partner requires them.
Fabulous for a winter getaway. Could imagine it's pretty hectic in summer....they have really packed in as many cabins and sites as possible. But was good in winter.
Very good holiday park. They have great facilities, nice staff and close to the beach. Will keep coming back!
great park close to the beach, modern and inviting, will definitely stay there again. A bonus was the cafe next door with a delicious menu and quick service ( and takeaway for all meals).
